plugins.name: ui-skills
plugins.description: Clone a live website into React + Tailwind. Splash-aware dual-snapshot extraction (auto-detect completion, no hardcoded waits), SVG-as-text detection, hover completeness enforcement (inline style rules, data-text swap, video capture), smooth-scroll scroll capture (wheel events), CSS value accuracy verification, body style scoping, anti-skip validate-gate.sh (blocks on missing hover rules, px fontSize leaks, scroll event listeners). 3 skills, automated pipeline with anti-rationalization gates.
